libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For native-image run coverage on JDK 25, configure the generated test project's nativeTest runtime arguments for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1 to include -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true. Meaningful tests can use an embedded Vert.x HttpServer bound to 127.0.0.1 with WebClient/WebClientOptions, BodyCodec JSON/string/buffer handling, forms/multipart upload, redirects, sessions/cookies, and caching; no external service is required.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The existing 5.0.0 scaffold only gates the Netty Unsafe runtime properties on version 5.0.0, so a generated 5.0.1 fix may fail native runtime verification unless it generalizes that setup.
Optional Vert.x Web Client paths involving OAuth2 authentication may require io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2, but they are not necessary for meaningful baseline coverage.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Vert.x Web Client 5.0.1 is usable with its normal transitive dependencies and local HTTP servers, but its Vert.x Core/Netty 4.2.2 stack needs Java 25 native-image runtime properties for Unsafe access.
